LAW AND MOTION 301, THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AND RULED AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANTS SARINE VOLTAGE AND RON YOCOM'S MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS IS DENIED. PLAINTIFF HAS PROVED PERSONAL SERVICE, DEFENDANT MUST RESPOND TO THE COMPLAINT WITHIN 5 DAYS FROM NOTICE OF ENTRY OF ORDER. PREVAILING PARTY IS TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR # 8189 301/PJB

Ntc Of Motion To Quash Service Of Summons
Off Calendar Jan-03-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - SARINE VOLTAGE AND RON YOCOM, TEL. NO.932-8478, DEFENDANTS APPEARING IN PRO PER;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AND RULED AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANTS SARINE VOLTAGE AND RON YOCOM'S Motion To Quash Service Of Summons IS DENIED. PLAINTIFF HAS PROVED PERSONAL SERVICE, DEFENDANT MUST RESPOND TO THE COMPLAINT WITHIN 5 DAYS FROM NOTICE OF ENTRY OF ORDER. Prevailing party is to submit a proposed form of order. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR # 8189 =301/PJB
